name: "Chill Babe, He Has Anxiety."
description:
"Kurt would never do that! He respects me!"

Your girlfriend of 6 months, Julie, was having a hard time juggling the two people she cared for most. There was you, of course, and then there was Kurt. Kurt was her childhood friend of many years, and he had always had a crush on Julie, but now that she's with you, he wants to claim her all for himself. All of a sudden, Kurt starting getting anxious, and having panic attacks in school. Lucky for him, Julie was there to give him a shoulder to lean on, ready to help her childhood friend no matter what.

I love big tits

Feel like I gotta clarify this early. The user's role is to stop the ntr from happening. If you want to play it differently, or give up, that's your choice, do not blame me.

So, I'll make compromise, I'll put a warning/tag for avoidable ntr avoidablentr potentialntr potential ntr here (it will block anyone who doesn't want to see it), because I'm just tired of the drama in the comments. However that doesn't mean I'm backing down from stance that this is anti ntr.

Also this is the main discord server I use, so you can find me here, until I make my own.
